description: DataForSEO provides a suite of RESTful APIs delivering SEO data such as SERP rankings, keyword suggestions, backlink profiles, and more, enabling developers and marketers to integrate real-time search engine insights into their applications.
authentication: API key and secret passed via HTTP headers (X-API-KEY and X-API-SECRET) or query parameters.
self_serve: Yes – developers can sign up for an API key and access the full suite of endpoints without a dedicated sales representative.
api_surface: RESTful JSON APIs covering SERP, Keyword, Backlinks, Domain, Competitor, Rank Tracking, and more, with batch request support and pagination.
buildability: High – comprehensive documentation, example code snippets, SDKs in multiple languages, and clear error handling.
main_blocker: Strict rate limits and high cost for large data volumes can hinder large-scale integrations.
